problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
